assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: business owners and marketers spending on Meta ads without a clear evidence-backed diagnosis

creative_strategy.audience_insight: A library may contain many assets that are only cosmetic variations of the same concept.
creative_strategy.message_angle: The audit distinguishes meaningful concepts from simple resizes and recolors.
creative_strategy.hook: More files do not always mean more ideas.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A physical archive of nearly identical covers beside distinct concept volumes will visualize creative diversity without performance claims.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: an editorial archive shelf containing many near-identical thin covers and a few materially distinct concept volumes
visual_direction.action: the shelf reorganizes by core idea rather than file count
visual_direction.environment: a premium dark design archive with tactile books and sample boards
visual_direction.composition: archive fills right side, distinct volumes highlighted center, copy field upper-left
visual_direction.lighting: soft library spotlights with lime concept markers and subtle violet depth
visual_direction.style: high-end design-library photography with graphic order and texture

copy.overlay_headline: More files do not always mean more ideas.
copy.caption: Creative variety comes from different concepts, hooks, and messages, not only new crops. A Meta audit reviews the mix alongside account evidence.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is an editorial archive shelf containing many near-identical thin covers and a few materially distinct concept volumes. Show the shelf reorganizes by core idea rather than file count. Set the scene in a premium dark design archive with tactile books and sample boards. Composition: archive fills right side, distinct volumes highlighted center, copy field upper-left. Lighting: soft library spotlights with lime concept markers and subtle violet depth. Visual style: high-end design-library photography with graphic order and texture. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'The audit distinguishes meaningful concepts from simple resizes and recolors.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'More files do not always mean more ideas.', support line '$175 Full Meta Ads Audit', and CTA 'Audit your creative mix' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid book titles, ad thumbnails, fatigue thresholds, winner badges or claims that variety guarantees performance, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
book titles, ad thumbnails, fatigue thresholds, winner badges or claims that variety guarantees performance

accessibility.alt_text: A design archive reorganizes many similar covers into a few genuinely distinct concept volumes.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $175 price and full-audit scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
